subject: We Won #GA5
body:
And Now We Won't Stop Until We Flip the Senate Blue | | | |
---
| [DONATE](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=c5acb27010&e=3f151f8b74 "DONATE")
---
| | | [ ](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=e1d55fa6cc&e=3f151f8b74)
---
Why Do We Need Moms in Office? Nikema Williams, Congresswoman Elect GA -05
|
---
| Friends,

Nikema Williams became the first woman to serve as a representative in Georgia's 5th Congressional District, a district held since 1987 by the late civil rights icon John Lewis. We are incredibly proud to have been part of this journey and can't wait to see this mom at the policymaking table!

We will continue to fight for Georgia, a historically Republican state that has become a battleground this past election between Democrats and Republicans.

Our support helped elect Congresswoman Nikema Williams to the house, but this election is not over until we flip the Senate Blue. Moms in Office is ready to fight to get Rev. Raphael Warnock and Jon Ossoff elected. Why is this so important not just for working moms fighting for paid leave, universal preschool, and access to healthcare, but for all Americans who need to build back their lives after one of the most devastating economic downturns in our country's history? Because the outcome of the runoff on January 5th, two weeks before President-elect Joe Biden's inauguration, could swing the majority to Democrats, handing the new president broad power to carry out his policy agenda. We simply can't let Republicans continue to stand in the way of progress and change for working families in America. Will you stand with Moms in Office to[ help us](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=12e4fc520c&e=3f151f8b74) flip Georgia blue? Chip in today because single moms like me and working families in America count on us to help Joe Biden lead our country out of this recession. He can't do it without the Senate and he can't do it without you and me.

Sincerely,

Simona Grace

Founder, Moms in Office

name: Scott Fitzgerald
subject: This isn't over.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
body:
What's next? No images? [Click here](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-e-xiutujd-ahkdjtlkr-k/) [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xiutujd-ahkdjtlkr-r/) Dear Peter,Did you see what **Nancy Pelosi** said?
> "This has been a life-or-death fight for their very fate of our democracy," Pelosi said. "We did not win every battle **but we did win the war**."
_She won the war?_ The American people delivered her party a LOSS of seats in Congress, and we're on the way to a Republican majority in the Senate. **And the votes are still being counted in Wisconsin for President Trump.** Just because Election Day is behind us, does **NOT** mean this fight is over. [Join the Fight - $10](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xiutujd-ahkdjtlkr-y/) [Join the Fight - $25](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xiutujd-ahkdjtlkr-j/) In Congress, I'm going to continue to fight **against** Nancy Pelosi, **against** AOC, **against** defunding the police, and **against** the radical socialist agenda! This is far from over.**[Please, take a moment to join this fight. The future of our country depends on it.](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xiutujd-ahkdjtlkr-t/)** -Scott Fitzgerald

body: Peter, Thanks to your tremendous support, the Secretary of State of Georgia announced a full recount of the Presidential race to ensure that every LEGAL vote is counted. This is a major step in the right direction. I assure you that we will KEEP FIGHTING until EVERY LEGAL vote for President Trump is counted. But, this is no small undertaking, Peter. subject: No matter how hard they try, the GOP can’t change the results to fit Trump’s narrative.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by GBP, www
body:
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/21541074/261219562/-293505166?refcode=em111520-PM-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1OTY2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQxZmNkNmM5LTUzMjctZWIxMS05ZmI0LTAwMTU1ZDAzYWZmYyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zhf7hCHycEAOIfJxcI5zEmWm4SD2JaChUNnxiAiLaY4=)
Friend,
Georgia's votes are undergoing a recount, but one thing is certain — President-elect Joe Biden's lead is too great to change the outcome. **Donald John Trump lost this election by a landslide — more than 5 million votes and counting.** For only the 11th time in history, an incumbent president has lost his election. For the 1st time in history, a president has lost the popular vote twice.
_And yet, the Republican Party is standing back, standing by, and allowing Trump to throw a tantrum and undermine the presidential transition by refusing to concede on his way out._
Mitch McConnell has stopped most of his majority from acknowledging reality, despite the court system repeatedly shutting down the Trump legal team's efforts to change the outcome of the election.
**Republican senators are not acknowledging President-elect Biden's victory because if they do, they risk losing key support from Trump's base in our two Senate special elections that will decide the Senate majority.**
If we elect Reverend Raphael Warnock and Jon Ossoff to the United States Senate on January 5th, we will have the Democratic majority needed to let the Biden-Harris Administration govern unimpeded. This means progress on so many important priorities, including passing a coronavirus relief bill that puts cash in the hands of millions of Americans who have struggled economically since this crisis began. We simply cannot afford another term of Mitch McConnell stonewalling progress while we navigate the worst public health crisis our nation has faced in 100 years.
[**_Chip in _**_**$26 to fund the Georgia Blue Project's voter turnout ads for each Senate race so that on January 5th we can use our own power to secure this victory and elect Reverend Warnock and Jon Ossoff.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/21541075/261219563/-1328876110?refcode=em111520-PM-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1OTY2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQxZmNkNmM5LTUzMjctZWIxMS05ZmI0LTAwMTU1ZDAzYWZmYyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zhf7hCHycEAOIfJxcI5zEmWm4SD2JaChUNnxiAiLaY4=)

name: Tim Scott
subject: Schumer just admitted something BIG
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
body:
Schumer and his allies are not even trying to hide their radical plans anymore. If they FLIP both Senate seats in Georgia, then they are going to change the world.
Friend,

Did you hear what Chuck Schumer said about the Georgia Runoff elections?

Schumer and his allies are not even trying to hide their radical plans anymore. If they FLIP both Senate seats in Georgia, then they are going to change the world.
[Stop Schumer's Takeover](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/chuck-schumer-wants-to-change-the-world/?utm_campaign=20201115_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1040696-1260&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20201115_schumer-just-admitted-something-big)
---

Here is their plan:

* Enact the job-killing Green New Deal which will eliminate fossil fuels and fracking
* Eliminate private insurance and force all Americans onto a government run plan
* Repeal Opportunity Zones ending crucial investments in our impoverished communities
* Confirm liberal judges to the bench that will ignore the Constitution
* Pass gun control which will take away your right to protect yourself and your family

Friend, I could keep going, but I think you get the idea.

name: BREAKING NEWS (National Victory Action Fund)
subject: New polling: Georgia runoffs are too close to call
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Victory Action Fund
body:
Our hearts sank when we saw the latest polling in the Georgia Senate runoffs. Both races are too close to call! Liberals from around the country -- including Chuck Schumer, AOC, Barack Obama, Stacey Abrams, and Joe Biden -- are pulling out ALL THE STOPS to defeat David Perdue and Kelly Loeffler in these must-win seats.
Friend, our hearts sank when we saw the latest polling in the Georgia Senate runoffs. **_Both races are too close to call!_** Liberals from around the country -- including **Chuck Schumer, AOC, Barack Obama, Stacey Abrams, and Joe Biden** \-- are pulling out ALL THE STOPS to defeat **David Perdue and Kelly Loeffler** in these must-win seats. The polls are neck and neck and we need YOUR HELP to put Perdue and Loeffler over the top. name: Mary Mancini
subject: Bill Lee
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
Peter,
Unbelievable! Governor Bill Lee STILL refuses to acknowledge Joe Biden as the President Elect. Willfully discrediting our democracy and the sanctity of our vote is not only shameful, it’s dangerous. T he TNDP is here - and will always be here - to fight back.
With your help, we are building a movement - strong candidates and campaigns, smart investments, voter registration, turnout, and protection - Tennessee Democrats were able to not only hold the line at the state legislature but continue to cut into the GOP supermajority.
In fact, Tennessee is one of only ten states to make gains in the State Legislature in 2020.
The TNDP is not backing down. We need to continue this movement to elect more Democratic leadership in Tennessee. We are organized, energized, and ready to take advantage of the enthusiasm among Tennessee Democrats right now. We are looking towards the future, but can’t do this alone.
We are still $3,290 away from our mid-month goal, and we only have until midnight tonight. Can you chip in now, and help the Tennessee Democratic Party continue to fight for a better future for all of us? [http://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/signature2.png]
--
Mary Mancini
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party

subject: Official Strategy Memo for Peter Willis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elect Republicans ([www
body:
[For Your Eyes Only]
| Hello, Peter! You are receiving this email because you signed up to receive emails that help elect Republicans. To update your email preferences, [click here](http://go.electrepublicans.org/email-pause-hcyg3zodnis23eo5gx58?e=1a1fe10c9303676f5a8934f3586944e0&utm_source=electrepublicans&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=anv_p&n=1).
---
**— CONFIDENTIAL MEMO —** **FOR PETER WILLIS ONLY. DO NOT FORWARD.** Good morning, Peter. This is an official Elect Republicans HQ briefing on the state of the election. The fight for the US Senate Majority has gone into overtime, with must-win Runoff Elections in Georgia on January 5th (just 51 days from today). **Republicans must win these Runoff Elections to protect our Senate Majority and preserve a check against Joe Biden and the Democrats.** At Elect Republicans’ HQ, our primary focus is to support Senators Loeffler and Perdue in their re-election efforts through our Georgia Victory Fund. Each morning, we run the numbers and set an ambitious fundraising goal to help us stay on track. Today, our goal is to raise $13,419 by midnight tonight. **[Can you chip in $5 or more to help us reach this goal? subject: VIDEO: Republicans Rally for Senate Majority in Forsyth County
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/58026fd48111/video-republicans-rally-for-senate-majority-in-forsyth-county?e=02cd889ad3)
---
|
---
|
**VIDEO: Republicans Rally for Senate Majority in Forsyth County**

---
| Folks, **Georgia Republicans are FIRED UP and ready to re-elect Senators David Perdue and Kelly Loeffler.**

On Friday, at a Defend the Majority rally in Forsyth County featuring Florida Senator Rick Scott, the Senators encouraged Georgians to **stand in the breach against Socialism** , Chuck Schumer, Nancy Pelosi, and the radical leftists who, in Schumer’s own words, want to [“take Georgia, then change America.”](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=2b63358a8c&e=02cd889ad3)
---
|
---
| **Click[ here](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=1644eaccce&e=02cd889ad3) or below to watch.**
---
| [ ](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=f6f2bfd151&e=02cd889ad3)
---
| **Senator Rick Scott:** “David Perdue and Kelly Loeffler’s opponents are basically just puppets for Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer. If you vote for their opponents, you’re voting for all the bad things that Nancy Pelosi, AOC, and Chuck Schumer believe in.”
**Senator Loeffler:** “Make no mistake. We are the firewall, not just for the U.S. Senate, but for the future of our country...**No one is going to outwork David Perdue and me** to make sure Georgians have what they need and that America has the freedoms that we deserve and our God-given rights under the Constitution... we will be your voice in Washington if you’re our voice on January 5th.”
_**Senator Perdue closed the rally with a clear message: The future of America hangs in the balance. **_
**Senator Perdue:** “They really want to be defunding the police when we should be DEFENDING the police. They want open borders and sanctuary cities - tell me how that's going to make our neighborhoods safer? It’s not!”
“Kelly and I are asking you to **STAND WITH US**. Stand with us to make sure that we can go back to Washington and **stand up against AOC, Nancy Pelosi, Chuck Schumer, and all these radical leftists**. Most importantly, stand with us, and... let's make darn sure that the road to Socialism never runs through the state of Georgia.”
**ALERT: Facebook banned all political ads, so the only way we can spread the word is through YOU!**

**_Check out our new TV Ad, ["Change"](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=e32fdcc39e&e=02cd889ad3):_**

**Click [HERE](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=59c7998046&e=02cd889ad3) to share on Facebook**
**Click [HERE](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=13a0826af9&e=02cd889ad3) to retweet**
---
| [ ](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=1829c181f7&e=02cd889ad3)
---
| **_Check out our new Digital Ad, ["Save Georgia, Save America"](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=fe9a70d274&e=02cd889ad3):_**

**Click [HERE](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=c4ee790f5d&e=02cd889ad3) to share on Facebook**
**Click [HERE](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=bd5f5df95b&e=02cd889ad3) to retweet**
---
| [ ](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=d21c83612c&e=02cd889ad3)
---
| **Now more than ever, we need ALL Georgians to stand with us to defend our majority. Thank you for your important work to help us hold the line.**

\- Team Perdue

| [VOLUNTEER]( "VOLUNTEER")

body:
Critical: Georgia Recount Fund | Thanks to your tremendous
support, the Secretary of State of Georgia announced a full
recount.

Peter,

Thanks to your tremendous
support, the Secretary of State of Georgia announced a full
recount of the Presidential race to ensure that every LEGAL vote
is counted.

This is a major step in the
right direction. I assure you that we will KEEP FIGHTING until
EVERY LEGAL vote for President Trump is counted.

But, this is no small
undertaking, Peter. Recounting EVERY vote by hand will take a
MASSIVE war chest, and we need YOU to help bolster our Official
Georgia Recount Fund.

If you step up NOW you can
increase your impact by 1000%.

I stand with President Trump
in his fight to count every legal vote, do you?

Please contribute ANY AMOUNT
IMMEDIATELY to the Official Georgia Recount Fund and you can
increase your impact by 1000%. >>

CONTRIBUTE $250 = $2750

CONTRIBUTE $100 = $1100

CONTRIBUTE $50 = $550

CONTRIBUTE $45 = $495

CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT

President Trump has never
stopped fighting for us, and now it's time that we fight for him.

It's CRITICAL that you
support the Official Georgia Recount Fund because we cannot allow
the Democrats to try to steal this Election.

Contribute ANY AMOUNT
IMMEDIATELY to increase your impact by 1000%.

Thank you,

Mike Pence

Vice President of the
United States

CONTRIBUTE $45 = $495

Neither printed nor produced at government expense.

Contributions to the Trump Make America Great
Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax
purposes.

Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and
composed of Donald J. Trump for President, Inc., Save America,
and the Republican National Committee.

Trump Make America Great Again Committee, 725 Fifth

We believe this is an important way to reach our
grassroots supporters with the most up-to-date information
regarding the efforts of the Trump Make America Great Again
Committee and President Trump, and we're glad you're on our team.
It's because of grassroots supporters like you that we will Make
America Great Again, and we appreciate your support. Thank you
for all that you do!

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Weekend Recap: Hospital Capacity, Upgraded Testing Portal, and the Vaccine
body:
Your RI COVID-19 News Update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
Cases are rising drastically, and it's more important than ever that we all stay informed. Please, stay home except for essential activities, and wear a mask anytime you're with people you don't live with. Together, we can turn our case numbers around.
If you know someone who needs a way to stay up-to-date on the latest measures Rhode Island is taking to stop the spread of COVID-19, please encourage them to sign up for these emails through this link: [lp.constantcontactpages.com/su/eYMG9tf](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fKuD8xIhwspihTzOl9sdKp_pJ0Nu48vPu6yqX-o68mSydaTwnJ51EgK0rC2ePHy5kzh7ep7K3vlrLc1HdGP4eUUeC7Bwco9Hu-SBnuckbcpNPQJZU44tj_xc0R5Ud28CLmNzvOgloXHEpGLLLi4jomi6IKpctMBPzUr4w06INJk4JsxU40uhssIOcZaNNVyCM6jGXEWRcC7Qj0qdrPqWswL34MEauGGPc7CUcP4ApuyVElCjonUMo8q3db-D43jqDB9sUvDSqK6X14ZIoVopFRXbvk3E2WyG8GXzOdlC4TY0ffkzCbm6YqPPtmfpX1VDwkfRLMzuv48=&c=sm3HDhxX6tObUUsUDBNESCH8NehGgOv567yvUzHd2Fmy2Q9GI1_aIg==&ch=TNxMYLID84fYLF9TAWiaWS6fJpSHayXY4LqcCRwhgIYNMjqRdfWy4g==). The better we all stay informed, the better we'll be able to keep ourselves, our families, and our friends safe from COVID-19.
---
| | |
---|---
|
HOSPITAL CAPACITY

Our emergency rooms are being pushed to their limits, and the pain and suffering in our hospitals and our communities is significant. Our case numbers and hospitalizations are skyrocketing, and our hospitals are near their capacity.

It's impossible to overstate the enormous strain this puts on the brave first responders working in our hospitals. Our healthcare workers are not immune to the virus. Many of them have been working nonstop for months, they're tired, and they and their families are bound by the same requirements as everyone else to isolate and quarantine when necessary. Please, think of these nurses and doctors who are putting their health and wellbeing on the line every day before you decide to go to a large social gathering or take your mask off around people you don't live with.
| | |
---|---
|
UPGRADED TESTING PORTAL
We've been working to make testing as accessible as possible, bringing it into communities, in local health clinics, in doctor's offices, and in public buildings. But there hasn't been one clear process for getting your results. Now, we've changed that. To make getting your test results easier, we've made it possible for all Rhode Islanders to get your results from a single place, no matter how you scheduled your test.

Right now, Rhode Islanders can access test results by going to [portal.ri.gov/results](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fKuD8xIhwspihTzOl9sdKp_pJ0Nu48vPu6yqX-o68mSydaTwnJ51Es_a8oE-QGt2i5kNn9fqL6-sQ5BYWbMc073Yblhtoka1_MhcHN5EvTiHGPVaZfLoFYA86i2iP1PayMSvtD_E5HennccHico7CQ==&c=sm3HDhxX6tObUUsUDBNESCH8NehGgOv567yvUzHd2Fmy2Q9GI1_aIg==&ch=TNxMYLID84fYLF9TAWiaWS6fJpSHayXY4LqcCRwhgIYNMjqRdfWy4g==). It doesn't matter if you scheduled through the state's portal, if you went through the K-12 system, or if you were tested at a doctor's office. When you log in, you will go through a two-factor authentication using the phone number or email you provided at the time of your test. Remember, if your results come back positive, immediately isolate yourself and reach out to your close contacts. Don't wait for a call from the Department of Health to begin this process.
| | |
---|---
|
VACCINE

We got a glimmer of good news this week when the Pfizer vaccine trial's initial results showed 90% effectiveness. We're not there yet, but we're hoping to have the vaccine in Rhode Island for some limited, higher-risk groups before the end of the year, with the vaccine becoming more widely available during the first few months of 2021.

We'll hold this vaccine to the same standards as any other, and our COVID-19 Vaccine Subcommittee will do an extra layer of review, on top of all the safety reviews that will be done on the national level.
| I hope you find this recap informative. Please, remember your three W's: wear a mask, wash your hands, and watch your distance. Together, we can stop the rising case numbers and save lives if we just band together now and follow the rules.
I'll be back on TV with more updates Wednesday at 1 p.m.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19. If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fKuD8xIhwspihTzOl9sdKp_pJ0Nu48vPu6yqX-o68mSydaTwnJ51EgK0rC2ePHy5jFOMnCPxzZPmt0l5aDtw0tfZQZ9b-7CE__Stm8ClRx3V9yyfRU84jTX8jvRY_ZzK0NgJFXONwYNuEDynxAhDJ7NA3mtX55oRHBb5rz7esrckSTHLkDxn7VbXY4soIQYPRBKxK-WyjQozS6UCaF6NWTyhs5jk4Yf8J6aRIQtdV2fO8wLzQWC4wMuLirDwx6higrHIXFHc4XTQXWHSateupdi8oCXlaBgEb2iNNw5Mzw78qFuNkMRoGN1bp6PG0hUpX3Cyli7lQmk=&c=sm3HDhxX6tObUUsUDBNESCH8NehGgOv567yvUzHd2Fmy2Q9GI1_aIg==&ch=TNxMYLID84fYLF9TAWiaWS6fJpSHayXY4LqcCRwhgIYNMjqRdfWy4g==).
---
| | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903
---

---

It doesn't matter if you scheduled through the state's portal, if you went through the K-12 system, or if you were tested at a doctor's office. When you log in, you will go through a two-factor authentication using the phone number or email you provided at the time of your test. Remember, if your results come back positive, immediately isolate yourself and reach out to your close contacts. Don't wait for a call from the Department of Health to begin this process. | | | ---|--- | VACCINE We got a glimmer of good news this week when the Pfizer vaccine trial's initial results showed 90% effectiveness. We're not there yet, but we're hoping to have the vaccine in Rhode Island for some limited, higher-risk groups before the end of the year, with the vaccine becoming more widely available during the first few months of 2021. We'll hold this vaccine to the same standards as any other, and our COVID-19 Vaccine Subcommittee will do an extra layer of review, on top of all the safety reviews that will be done on the national level. | I hope you find this recap informative. Please, remember your three W's: wear a mask, wash your hands, and watch your distance. Together, we can stop the rising case numbers and save lives if we just band together now and follow the rules. I'll be back on TV with more updates Wednesday at 1 p.m. We're all in this together. -Gina Raimondo Governor P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19. If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use ==. | | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903 | | Sent by mailto:communications@governor.ri.gov powered by

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Perdue?=
subject: WATCH: Senator David Perdue On Fox News: Georgia Is The Last Line Of Defense
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/be2471930fe9/watch-senator-david-perdue-on-fox-news-georgia-is-the-last-line-of-defense?e=02cd889ad3)
---
|
---
| **WATCH: Senator David Perdue On Fox News:
Georgia Is The Last Line Of Defense**
This morning, Senator David Perdue joined Maria Bartiromo on Fox News’s _Sunday Morning Futures_ to discuss defending the Senate majority and what’s at stake in Georgia.

**To watch the full segment, click[here](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=84a531f646&e=02cd889ad3) or below.**
---
| [ ](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=7d14199d3f&e=02cd889ad3 "Sen. David Perdue Joins Sunday Morning Futures on Fox News")
---
| **On What’s at Stake in Georgia:** _“We are the last line of defense against this liberal socialist agenda that the Democrats will perpetrate. We heard Schumer say just last week, ‘If we take Georgia, we change America.’ We heard AOC say they have to have these two seats because they don't want to negotiate. They want total control, and so what's at stake is this: Schumer will change the rules in the Senate so they can do anything they want."_ **On Democrats' Dangerous Economic Agenda:** _“Elizabeth Warren wants to be Secretary of Treasury. It's already a given that Bernie Sanders would be chairman of the Budget Committee, Sherrod Brown would be chairman of the Banking Committee. These are people who really do not believe in our free market system...In the Senate, we can protect the gains and accomplishments of the last four years. President Trump gave us an agenda that created the best economic turnaround in U.S. history. 6.5 million Americans have pulled themselves out of poverty. That will all get undone if we lose both seats in Georgia."_ **On the Green New Deal:** _“[The Green New Deal would cost] $9 trillion per year...Hidden inside the Green New Deal is Medicare For All cost, the $30,000 a year stipend for people unable or unwilling to work, and free college education. All of these things have nothing to do with climate change, but they're hiding it in there to make sure that we don't get a chance to debate it. And so, only about 20% of the Green New Deal has anything to do with climate change.”_ **On Calls for Democrats to Move to Georgia, Vote, and Leave:** _"It's illegal, and it shows how desperate the Democrats are. They know they can't win straight up - we proved that in our election in my seat...They know that to win in this runoff they've got to do something illegal, and we're not going to let it happen. What they're encouraging people to do is to use artificial addresses or move in temporarily. Our law says they have to be here permanently. It just shows they're willing to do anything - lie, steal, cheat, to win this election."_ **On Jon Ossoff’s Business Ties to the Chinese Communist Government:** _“Jon Ossoff worked for a communist Chinese news agency that's owned by the Communist Chinese government. He denied it twice, in public, and yet there's an official document filed with the government that says he did work with them. That in combination with the fact he worked for Al Jazeera for over nine years tells us he'll never hold China accountable or deal with foreign policy with a straight up perspective."_ ###
---

name: True the Vote
subject: Daily Update - Nov. 15
body:
| | | | [](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=320A737A20A3259)
---
| | Dear friends,

I hope everyone had a restful weekend. Yesterday, I shared with you the lawsuits we have filed to represent voters who encountered instances of election irregularities ahead of or on election day \- in Pennsylvania, Michigan, Wisconsin and Georgia. I want to tell you a little more about these lawsuits and what our specific goal is in these actions. While each lawsuit is a little different because they are in different states, the common thread among all is our mission to analyze exactly how many illegal ballots were counted in each presidential election so we can know for certain the final vote count of LEGAL votes. While our lawsuits all cite the many instances of likely election irregularities based on credible witness testimony, the basis of each lawsuit is to gain access to the voting information we need to compare the ballots that were counted to the current voter rolls - this is how we weed out any illegal ballots that were counted and seek court action to have them nullified. We have a team of expert data analysts scouring the voter information that is publicly available. What we are waiting on is access to some of the voter information that isn’t publicly available - or that requires public records requests, which take time to obtain. Once we have access to the relevant information, we will be able to complete our work and once and for all provide the truth to the public so they can know what the real results of this election are.

On top of our litigation efforts, we have also been following up with the thousands of people who called into our election integrity hotline in recent weeks. We have been in contact with numerous voters, certified election officials, and government workers who firsthand experienced major violations of election law. Some of these workers are taking steps to obtain whistleblower protection so they can share their stories and we are helping them. We are in the process of wrapping up this work and have much to share in the near future. We are optimistic that our work from this election over the long term will result in critical reforms to restore confidence in our election system once more- and in the short term, provide much needed insight into the real results of the presidential campaign. We are working harder now than ever. It is because of you and your support that we have come this far. Thank you for all you do, and for staying in this fight. Stay with us, we have much more to share in the coming days!
Onward,

---
| |
---
| | Catherine Engelbrecht
Founder, True the Vote
---
| | NEWS YOU CAN USE
---
| | ****1.**[Trump Urges Judge to Preserve Suit Over Pennsylvania Ballots](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=320A737A20A3277)**** **The Trump campaign urged a judge to preserve its bid to block Pennsylvania from certifying President-elect Joe Biden as the winner, claiming there’s evidence that voters in Democratic-leaning counties were improperly allowed to fix errors with their ballots.
---
| |
---
|
---
| | ******2.********[Fox News: Why doesn't Biden camp want to know the truth about voting irregularities?](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=320A737A20A3273)**
House Judiciary Committee ranking member Rep. Jim Jordan, R-Ohio, addresses investigations into alleged election irregularitiesf on 'Sunday Morning Futures.'__
---
| |
---
|
---
| | ********3.**[The Citizen: Georgia voting irregularities: The curious case of Biden’s 20,000-vote surge](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=320A737A20A3274)**********
A curious thing happened as Fulton County, Ga., election officials counted mail-in ballots at Atlanta’s State Farm Arena in the days after the election. In the early hours of Nov. 5, a surge of some 20,000 mail-in votes suddenly appeared for Joe Biden, while approximately 1,000 votes for President Trump mysteriously disappeared from his own totals in the critical swing state, where Biden holds a razor-thin lead. _[This article appeared Nov. 13, 2020 on the news and opinion aggregation site Real Clear Politics.](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=320A737A20A3275) It is reprinted with permission.]_
---
| | VIDEO SPOTLIGHT
---
| | **Last week, Sen. Ted Cruz gave a compelling argument for why we should allow the litigation process to play out.[ Take a look at his interview with Sean Hannity.](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=320A737A20A3278)

** ********CRUZ: "Are we going to follow the law?" asked Cruz. "The way the system works is that you follow the law. There are multiple lawsuits pending in multiple states. The right standard is that every single legal vote should be counted. But any vote that was illegally cast should not be counted."** **
---
| | [](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=320A737A20A3278)
---
| |
---
|
---
